title: OrchestratorGateEvent
description: Structured gate-event emitted by Orchestrator at each workflow decision point. Enables log correlation across multi-agent chains via trace_id. Iteration and budget fields defer to governance/runtime-policy.json for authoritative values.

iteration_index.description: Current iteration index in plan-review loop. Incremented on REPLAN-with-new-plan-path events; the revised plan should carry revision_of referencing the prior plan path.

max_iterations.description: Maximum iterations for this plan-review loop; authoritative value sourced from governance/runtime-policy.json → max_iterations_by_tier based on plan complexity tier.

assumption_verifier_status.description: Status of AssumptionVerifier mirage detection for this gate.

executability_verifier_status.description: Status of ExecutabilityVerifier executability check for this gate. ABSTAIN is treated as a blocking review outcome requiring Orchestrator follow-up.

trace_id.description: UUID v4 for log correlation across multi-agent chains.

diagnosis_packet.description: Optional structured diagnosis evidence attached when routing a fixable retry on a MEDIUM/LARGE plan. Required by Orchestrator Diagnosis Packet policy for MEDIUM/LARGE fixable retries.

reproduction_steps.description: Minimal command or scenario that reproduces the failure on demand.

root_cause_hypothesis.description: One-sentence explanation of the underlying cause, not the symptom.

affected_component.description: Smallest file, schema, rule, or module that must change to fix the root cause.

stack_trace_excerpt.description: Key lines from error output or logs confirming the hypothesis. Optional.
